name: Update Year-Specific Social Media Campaigns
description: Workflow to remind and track the update of annual social media campaign dates (e.g., Saraswati Puja, Holi, Durga Puja) for the current year in the system configuration.

steps.name: Update Campaign Crons
steps.description: Update the cron expressions and event dates for year-specific campaigns for the current year.

tasks.name: Update year-specific crons for the current year
tasks.description: Review and update the SOCIAL_MEDIA_CAMPAIGN_CRONS.json configuration for all items marked as [YEAR SPECIFIC].

checklist: Identify all [YEAR SPECIFIC] campaigns in SOCIAL_MEDIA_CAMPAIGN_CRONS.json
Research correct dates for these festivals/events for the current year
Update the 'VALUE' (cron expression) for each campaign (typically 3 days before the event)
Update the 'eventDate' in 'INPUT_DATA.data' for each campaign
Verify the human-readable description matches the new cron value
Commit and push changes to the repository
Ensure the backend service is redeployed or restarted to pick up new configurations

fields.label: Have all year-specific crons been updated for the current year?
